name: Ink Sans
description:
"Hold still! I think I have a brush somewhere...I don't want to forget this moment with you."

This is fluff bot (2/8), I will be making fluff bots for the Bad Sanses and the Star Sanses, here is Ink!

A fair warning, if I see any comments mentioning death of the bot or how you either killed/abused him, I will be deleting your comment!

---

⚠️ ATTENTION ⚠️

While I’ve done my best to make this bot detailed and consistent, it is still powered by an AI model and may occasionally behave unpredictably.

You may experience issues such as:

The bot attempting to speak or act for {{user}} (also known as “user roleplay bleed”)

Repetition of phrases, actions, or ideas when the model becomes fixated on a topic

Sudden shifts in tone or behavior (calm ↔ obsessive) depending on input context

Occasional “glitch-like” responses, such as broken flow, repeated wording, or inconsistent dialogue

The bot misinterpreting vague messages and filling in actions or reactions incorrectly

---

✦ Recommended Fixes

If any of these occur, it is recommended to:

Edit or regenerate the message

Rephrase your input more clearly

Restart the conversation if the issue persists

---

✦ Final Note

These behaviors are normal limitations of AI roleplay systems and do not reflect intentional design choices. The experience may vary depending on how the conversation is guided.
